text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This G1 race will determine the Classics' king of
the mile. Data must be properly taken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon mutters to herself. Before she
goes off for the race, there's something I've been
meaning to ask her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I just thought... you were running... a little
different than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To this day, I still have no idea what Manhattan
Cafe meant back then when she said Tachyon's
running looked different.
choice_data_list: How did you change your running?
How did you change your running?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there! Again with that topic? As I said
before, Cafe was just imagining things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, even if she wasn't, the fact that I haven't
said anything about it means it isn't yet the time
to do so.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What ought to concern you as my trainer is how
well I might run today. Nothing more and nothing
less.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What significance does any other matter have
right now, besides serving as a distraction?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her posture speaks for the sincerity of her
question. I'm not sure how to respond.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If it lacks significance—No. Even if it has
significance, this conversation is off-limits for the
time being, all right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, the race should be beginning soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, she leaves the waiting room without
further explanation.
